Talents.teamWeaknessesDesc: Talents in Bottom 5 for a significant part of the team — areas that cost the team energy
Talents.spofAlertsDesc: Talents where only ONE person has it in Top 10 — risk if they leave
Talents.noWeaknesses: No significant weaknesses detected — the team has good coverage
Talents.noSpof: No critical dependencies — talents are well distributed

Presentation.title: Results Presentation
Presentation.domainExecutingDesc: People strong in Executing themes make things happen. They know how to turn ideas into action and deliver results.
Presentation.domainInfluencingDesc: People strong in Influencing themes take charge, speak up, and make sure others are heard.
Presentation.domainRelationshipDesc: People strong in Relationship Building themes build strong relationships that hold a team together and make it greater than the sum of its parts.
Presentation.domainStrategicDesc: People strong in Strategic Thinking themes help teams consider what could be. They absorb and analyze information to make better decisions.
